businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest publicly traded Ethereum holder — applying MicroStrategy's Bitcoin playbook to Ethereum as a digital asset treasury company
businessSummary.description: Originally a Bitcoin mining company, pivoted to Ethereum treasury strategy after Tom Lee (Fundstrat co-founder) joined. Holds 4,473,587 ETH (3.71% of total supply) as of 3/1, with total crypto + cash of $9.9B. Closed 3/6 at $18.88 (-7.22%). Culper Research short report fallout continues as ETH trades flat at $1,977. Simply Wall St analyzes how MAVAN staking launch and ETH accumulation are altering the investment case. Forward P/E 24.84x, P/B 0.69x (31% NAV discount).
howTheyMakeMoney: ETH Treasury: 4,473,587 ETH held ($8.84B at $1,976/ETH) — core value driver
ETH Staking Revenue: 3,040,483 ETH staked, ~$172M annual revenue
Venture Investments: Beast Industries ($200M), Eightco Holdings ($14M) moonshot bets
keyProducts: Ethereum Treasury Strategy: 3.71% of total ETH supply concentrated holding
MAVAN: Made in America Validator Network — proprietary staking platform (launching early 2026)
ETH Staking: 68% of holdings staked, 3 staking provider partnerships
Moonshot Portfolio: Beast Industries, Eightco Holdings

overallOpinion: BMNR at $18.88 is testing $18 support precisely. P/B 0.69x represents a 31% NAV discount — whether this is opportunity or value trap is the central question.
Culper's 'death spiral' thesis vs bitcoinethereumnews's '$1.2B daily burn' rebuttal — the ETH tokenomics debate is heating up.
+4,158% share dilution is a serious concern. Diluting shareholders 42x to buy ETH is a red flag for long-term investors.
MAVAN proprietary staking is positive, but 3 employees managing $9.9B in assets is an inherent operational risk.
Bottom line: If you're bullish on ETH, this is a high-beta leverage play. If bearish, stay far away. No middle ground.
